summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Tinkú Phase 3 - Student Management (gestión de alumnos). All 13 test scenarios passed successfully. Student CRUD operations, parental consent flow, login code generation/regeneration, plan limits, and deletion with grace period all working correctly.

issues: 404 page shows English text 'This page could not be found.' instead of Spanish/Rioplatense. Should be localized.

action_items: MINOR: Localize 404 page text to Spanish/Rioplatense (currently shows 'This page could not be found.')
seed_data_creation: Created student 'Mateo E.' (later renamed from 'Mateo') with avatar_03 (cat), grade_2, birth_year 2017. Login code regenerated from CLULG4 to 74RTPM during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 student management fully tested. Test user has 1 student (Mateo E.) at capacity limit (1/1 for Free plan). Student was created, edited, had login code regenerated, deletion requested then cancelled. All flows working correctly.
tests_passed: Dashboard empty state: shows empty-students message + add-student-btn when no students
Dashboard capacity-label shows '0 / 1 hijo' for Free plan (before adding student)
Navigate to /students/new: renders new-student-page with all form elements
Form elements present: new-student-firstname, new-student-birthyear (default 2018), new-student-grade (default grade_2)
Avatar picker: 6 avatar buttons (avatar_01 to avatar_06) present with correct testids
Consent section: consent-text div with legal text visible, consent-checkbox present
Submit button disabled until consent-checkbox is checked
Avatar selection: clicking avatar-avatar_03 sets aria-pressed=true and deselects previous
Consent checkbox toggle: enables/disables submit button correctly
Student creation: submit with valid data (Mateo, 2017, grade_2, avatar_03, consent=true) creates student and redirects to /students/[id]
Student detail page: shows student-name, login-code (6 chars monospace), copy-code-btn, edit-student-link, regen-code-btn, request-delete-btn
Dashboard with student: shows students-list with student-row-[id], capacity 1/1, no add-student-btn (limit reached), plan limit message
Capacity full: navigating to /students/new shows limit-reached page with Free plan message
Regenerate code: regen-code-btn opens regen-confirm, clicking regen-confirm-yes regenerates code and shows action-notice
Copy code button: clicking copy-code-btn doesn't crash (clipboard may be blocked in headless)
Edit student: edit-student-link navigates to /students/[id]/edit with edit-firstname, edit-grade, edit-avatar-* buttons
Edit form: shows current values, changing name to 'Mateo E.' and submitting redirects back with updated name
Request deletion: request-delete-btn opens delete-confirm with 30 days text, clicking request-delete-yes redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows 'baja pendiente' for student with pending deletion
Pending deletion banner: student detail shows pending-deletion-banner (orange) with cancel-deletion-btn
Cancel deletion: clicking cancel-deletion-btn removes pending deletion, refresh shows banner gone
404 for non-existent student: navigating to /students/[fake-uuid] shows 404 page

mocked_apis_list: Navigator.clipboard (potentially blocked in headless - handled gracefully)
